temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on the face of a young boy with short, messy blonde hair. He is wearing a light-colored t-shirt. His face is filled with anguish, and he is crying, with tears visible on his cheeks. His mouth is open as if he is speaking or sobbing. In the foreground, the blurry, wet face of another person is visible, suggesting the boy is looking down at them. The background is dark and out of focus, keeping the attention on the emotional interaction between the two individuals. The camera remains steady, capturing the raw emotion of the moment. A young boy is crying, his voice high-pitched and shaky with distress. He sobs and whimpers, his words broken and filled with anguish as he says, "It's all over. Oh, oh, oh. Don't go." The background is silent, amplifying the raw emotion in his voice.
